🗞 Today's Daily Farm Brief

# 📰 Daily Farm Brief – Tuesday, 24 February 2026

> Your 3-minute roundup of today's important farming updates.

---

🌧 Weather Risk

  • Scotland: Heavy rain expected across Highlands tomorrow
  • England: Frost warnings for East Midlands overnight
  • Wales: High winds (50mph) expected Friday
---

💰 Grant Update

  • SFI: Payment schedule changes for Countryside Stewardship
  • RPA: New livestock unit calculation tool released
  • Farming Resilience Fund: Applications open until 15 March
---

🐄 Livestock Alert

  • Disease: Enhanced foot-and-mouth monitoring notice (UK-wide)
  • Prices: Lamb prices up 8% on last week at auction
  • Dairy: Milk prices continue firm
---

🚜 Equipment Deal

  • Fencing tools: 20% discount on stock fencing kits
  • Tractor servicing: Spring maintenance packages available
  • Livestock handling: New mobile crushes in stock
---

*Generated by AI • Sources: Met Office, DEFRA, AHDB, NFU, Farmers Weekly*
